zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Raynald於1468年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，她的父親William Reynald107歲，母親Mrs William Reynald17歲。她於大約1406年與William Reynald Griffith在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1524年4月13日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾易格特費爾德享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Raynald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (Yorkshire): variant of   Renard  .

variants.name: Reinhard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerd, Albrecht, Erwin, Gerda, Klaus, Kurt, Christoph, Dieter, Franz, Fritz, Georg, Gerhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Reinhardt  .

variants.name: Renard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri, Armand, Emile, Jacques, Marielle, Michel, Monique, Olivier, Pierre, Remi, Serge.
French and Walloon: from the ancient Germanic personal name Raginhard, composed of the elements ragin ‘counsel’ and hard ‘hard, strong’. Compare Raynard and Reynard .
English (Yorkshire): from the Old French personal name Reinart, Renart of ancient Germanic origin (see above). The surname was later much confused with Raynor and Reynold .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Raynald was born in 1468, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Reynald, was 107 and her mother, Mrs William Reynald, was 17. She married William Reynald Griffith about 1406, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 13 April 1524, in Ightfield, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Raynald(이)가 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Reynald(은)는 107세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs William Reynald(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1406년 영국 슈럽실르에서 William Reynald Griffith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1524년 4월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 이트필드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Raynald родилась в 1468 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Reynald было 107 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs William Reynald, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Reynald Griffith около 1406 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 апреля 1524 г. в местности аитфиелд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Raynald nació en 1468, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Reynald, tenía 107 años y su mamá, Mrs William Reynald, tenía 17 años. Se casó con William Reynald Griffith aproximadamente 1406, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 13 de abril de 1524, en Ightfield, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
